Render Context for Dependency Management

Source: R/context.R
context.Rd

Module-level environment that holds the active depkit::DependencyManager during a knit session. The context is initialised before knitr::knit() and torn down afterwards via on.exit().

Developed by Andrew Stryker.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
